title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners
company: Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners:
Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India South Asia Partners!
